query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trial_sample_data (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  trialUserId INT NOT NULL,
  sampleHouseId INT,
  sampleBusinessId INT,
  dataGeneratedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  dataTemplate VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'standard' NOT NULL,
  isIsolated BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_trial_user (trialUserId),
  FOREIGN KEY (trialUserId) REFERENCES trial_users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trial_sample_data (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  trialUserId INT NOT NULL,
  sampleHouseId INT,
  sampleBusinessId INT,
  dataGeneratedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  dataTemplate VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'standard' NOT NULL,
  isIsolated BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_trial_user (trialUserId),
  FOREIGN KEY (trialUserId) REFERENCES trial_users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
